description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the archlinux/base Docker image. Include a before_script that runs pacman -Suy --noconfirm and pacman --noconfirm -S rust base-devel clang before each job. Define a binary job that runs cargo build --release, stores the target/release/aurs binary as an artifact that expires in one week, and runs in the default test stage. Define a test job that runs cargo test, also in the default test stage. No additional caches, services, or deployment targets are configured.
